features.title: Initialize repository memory and stage-gate structure
features.context: Establish progressive-disclosure files before implementation begins.

features.title: Define autonomous spraying and fertigation requirements
features.context: Capture hardware, routing, safety, sensor, and dosing constraints before coding.

features.title: Define hardware BOM and Pixhawk/Raspberry Pi/pump/valve pinout
features.context: Create a non-firmware hardware integration reference for prototype purchasing, wiring, power isolation, and field-safe actuator control.

features.title: Select exact bench-test pump, nozzle, valve, and sensor ratings
features.context: Turn FEAT-003 generic hardware interfaces into concrete safe bench-test ratings for prototype procurement and validation.

features.title: Define water-only bench-test procedure and acceptance log
features.context: Create a deterministic, safe bench procedure for leak, pressure, e-stop, low-liquid, valve-zone, and nozzle catch-cup checks before chemical/fertilizer tests.

features.title: Define bench prototype procurement checklist
features.context: Convert the bench hardware ratings and procedure into a buyable checklist with quantities, must-have specs, alternates, inspection criteria, and no-secret/no-farm-data rules.
